title: Output of Instagram Shopify Leads Scraper
description: One scored lead per business in the dataset, plus a machine-readable run summary in the key-value store.

leads.title: Leads
leads.description: All collected leads: store URL and platform, Shopify verification, public contacts, Instagram profile and activity metrics, and the 0-100 lead score.

runSummary.title: Run summary
runSummary.description: Counts of profiles discovered and processed, websites inspected, Shopify stores found, leads with email, duplicates removed, and the filtered-out breakdown.
